# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

const ALLOWED_MODULE_HOSTS = [
  "deno.land",
  "esm.sh",
  "cdn.skypack.dev",
  "cdn.jsdelivr.net",
];

const ALLOWED_MODULE_PATTERNS = [
  /^https:\/\/deno\.land\/x\/[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+@[0-9.]+\/.+\.ts$/,
  /^https:\/\/esm\.sh\/[a-zA-Z0-9@/_-]+$/,
  /^https:\/\/cdn\.skypack\.dev\/[a-zA-Z0-9@/_-]+$/,
  /^https:\/\/cdn\.jsdelivr\.net\/npm\/[a-zA-Z0-9@/_-]+$/,
];

const MAX_MODULES = 10;
const MODULE_CACHE = new Map<string, any>();
const CACHE_TTL = 3600000;
const MODULE_LOAD_TIMEOUT = 5000;

interface ModuleMetadata {
  module: any;
  loadedAt: number;
}

interface PluginModule {
  name?: string;
  version?: string;
  handler?: (context: any) => Promise<any> | any;
  init?: () => Promise<void> | void;
}

function isValidModuleUrl(url: string): boolean {
  try {
    const parsedUrl = new URL(url);
    
    if (parsedUrl.protocol !== "https:") {
      return false;
    }

    const hostname = parsedUrl.hostname;
    if (!ALLOWED_MODULE_HOSTS.includes(hostname)) {
      return false;
    }

    return ALLOWED_MODULE_PATTERNS.some(pattern => pattern.test(url));
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function sanitizeModulePath(path: string): string {
  return path.trim().replace(/[<>'"]/g, "");
}

async function loadModuleWithTimeout(url: string, timeout: number): Promise<any> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), timeout);

  try {
    const module = await import(url);
    clearTimeout(timeoutId);
    return module;
  } catch (error) {
    clearTimeout(timeoutId);
    throw error;
  }
}

async function loadModule(modulePath: string): Promise<PluginModule> {
  const sanitizedPath = sanitizeModulePath(modulePath);

  if (!isValidModuleUrl(sanitizedPath)) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid or disallowed module URL: ${sanitizedPath}`);
  }

  const cached = MODULE_CACHE.get(sanitizedPath);
  if (cached && Date.now() - cached.loadedAt < CACHE_TTL) {
    return cached.module;
  }

  try {
    const module = await loadModuleWithTimeout(sanitizedPath, MODULE_LOAD_TIMEOUT);

    const metadata: ModuleMetadata = {
      module,
      loadedAt: Date.now(),
    };

    MODULE_CACHE.set(sanitizedPath, metadata);

    if (MODULE_CACHE.size > MAX_MODULES * 2) {
      const entries = Array.from(MODULE_CACHE.entries());
      entries.sort((a, b) => a[1].loadedAt - b[1].loadedAt);
      for (let i = 0; i < entries.length - MAX_MODULES; i++) {
        MODULE_CACHE.delete(entries[i][0]);
      }
    }

    return module;
  } catch (error) {
    throw new Error(`Failed to load module: ${error.message}`);
  }
}

function getModulePathsFromEnv(): string[] {
  const envModules = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES");
  if (!envModules) {
    return [];
  }

  return envModules
    .split(",")
    .map(m => m.trim())
    .filter(m => m.length > 0)
    .slice(0, MAX_MODULES);
}

function getModulePathsFromQuery(url: URL): string[] {
  const modules = url.searchParams.getAll("module");
  return modules.slice(0, MAX_MODULES);
}

async function executePlugins(
  modules: PluginModule[],
  context: any
): Promise<any[]> {
  const results = [];

  for (const module of modules) {
    try {
      if (typeof module.handler === "function") {
        const result = await Promise.race([
          module.handler(context),
          new Promise((_, reject) =>
            setTimeout(() => reject(new Error("Handler timeout")), 3000)
          ),
        ]);
        results.push({
          success: true,
          name: module.name || "unknown",
          result,
        });
      } else {
        results.push({
          success: false,
          name: module.name || "unknown",
          error: "No handler function found",
        });
      }
    } catch (error) {
      results.push({
        success: false,
        name: module.name || "unknown",
        error: error.message,
      });
    }
  }

  return results;
}

async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  if (url.pathname === "/health") {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ status: "healthy", cache_size: MODULE_CACHE.size }),
      {
        headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      }
    );
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/clear-cache") {
    MODULE_CACHE.clear();
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ message: "Cache cleared" }), {
      headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  try {
    const envModulePaths = getModulePathsFromEnv();
    const queryModulePaths = getModulePathsFromQuery(url);
    const allModulePaths = [...envModulePaths, ...queryModulePaths];

    if (allModulePaths.length === 0) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          message: "No modules specified",
          usage: "Add ?module=<url> query parameter or set PLUGIN_MODULES env var",
        }),
        {
          status: 200,
          headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
        }
      );
    }

    if (allModulePaths.length > MAX_MODULES) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: `Too many modules. Maximum allowed: ${MAX_MODULES}`,
        }),
        {
          status: 400,
          headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
        }
      );
    }

    const loadedModules: PluginModule[] = [];
    const errors: any[] = [];

    for (const modulePath of allModulePaths) {
      try {
        const module = await loadModule(modulePath);
        loadedModules.push(module);
      } catch (error) {
        errors.push({
          path: modulePath,
          error: error.message,
        });
      }
    }

    const context = {
      request: {
        method: req.method,
        url: req.url,
        headers: Object.fromEntries(req.headers.entries()),
      },
      timestamp: Date.now(),
    };

    const results = await executePlugins(loadedModules, context);

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        modules_loaded: loadedModules.length,
        modules_requested: allModulePaths.length,
        results,
        errors: errors.length > 0 ? errors : undefined,
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          "content-type": "application/json",
          "x-modules-loaded": loadedModules.length.toString(),
        },
      }
    );
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: "Internal server error",
        message: error.message,
      }),
      {
        status: 500,
        headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      }
    );
  }
}

serve(handler);
